message:
feat(messaging,database): fabric cell runtime with certified replies, NATS request-reply robustness, pool parking_lot migration

src/messaging/fabric.rs:
- Replace flat Vec<FabricMessage> with BTreeMap<String, FabricCellRuntime>
  cell-based state machine, adding cell_routes, routing (Sublist), and
  subscriber tracking
- Add FabricCellRuntime with per-cell obligation ledger, subscriber set,
  sequence generation, and admission-controlled publish path
- Add FabricCertifiedReply and FabricReplyDelivery for obligation-backed
  request-reply with RequestCertificate and ReplyCertificate validation
- Add certified_request() and certified_reply() methods
- Update FabricState::new() to accept endpoint for routing initialization
- Update mod.rs re-exports to include FabricCertifiedReply and
  FabricReplyDelivery

src/messaging/nats.rs:
- Fix request-reply to handle interleaved messages: track processed_any
  flag and only call read_more_until() when no messages were parsed in the
  current iteration, preventing blocking reads when replies arrive between
  parse attempts
- Apply same pattern to consume(): track processed_any and only read_more
  when the parse loop found nothing, preventing needless I/O waits

src/messaging/service.rs:
- Import test helpers (ReplySpaceRule, MorphismClass, etc.) directly
  instead of using super:: paths for clarity (23 occurrences)

src/database/pool.rs:
- Migrate DbPool inner lock from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot::Mutex,
  removing all .unwrap() calls on lock() (parking_lot never poisons)
- Reorder imports for consistency

tests/fabric_lab_integration.rs:
- Add CertifiedRequestScenarioSummary for structured certified request
  test assertions
- Add service_admission() helper for test fixture construction
- Add imports for ServiceAdmission, RequestCertificate, AckKind, ErrorKind

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
